overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a nighttime walk through a rain-soaked futuristic city. The camera moves from a sidewalk lined with digital billboards into a neon-lit commercial plaza featuring food stalls and outdoor seating areas.

scene_state.functional_zone: wet city sidewalk with safety railings and digital billboards

events.description: pedestrian with umbrella walks past the camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rain-soaked sidewalk next to orange safety railings

notable_agents.action: walking with black umbrella, passes close to camera on the left side

entered.detail: orange metal railings separating the sidewalk from the street
large illuminated advertisement screen mounted on building facade
bright green neon signage above a building entrance
tall street light casting reflections on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet city sidewalk at night, bordered by orange safety railings. The camera moves forward past a pedestrian carrying an umbrella, with a large digital billboard visible on the right building and neon signs illuminating the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional plaza with wall murals and scattered trees

events.description: turns left from the main sidewalk into an open plaza area
entering darker area with more prominent neon lighting from distant stalls

agents.ego_description: turning left off the sidewalk into a more open plaza space with trees and murals

entered.detail: large wall painting of a stylized face with crown and text
large concrete planter containing mature trees
small vendor booth with bright blue neon lighting visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left into an open plaza featuring a large building mural on the right and trees in concrete planters. The environment transitions from the street to a pedestrian area with distant neon lights from food stalls becoming visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit market plaza with food vendors and outdoor seating

events.description: approaching food stall area with red outdoor chairs and tables
slowing slightly while approaching the blue neon food stall counter

agents.ego_description: walking through the market plaza observing food stalls and neon signage

notable_agents.action: walking away from camera toward the food stalls in the plaza

entered.detail: tall vertical red banners with white text and graphics
food vendor stall with bright cyan blue neon trim and lighting
red plastic chairs and small tables arranged on the plaza
multiple illuminated vertical screens displaying advertisements

segments.scene_description: The final segment explores a vibrant market plaza filled with neon-lit food stalls. The camera passes red vertical banners and approaches a blue neon food stall with outdoor seating. Digital advertising screens line the right side while pedestrians walk through the open plaza area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rain-slicked city sidewalk into a vibrant, neon-lit commercial plaza. It begins by moving forward along a wet walkway bordered by orange safety railings, passing a pedestrian with an umbrella beneath the glow of large digital billboards and neon signs. As the camera turns left, the street environment transitions into an open pedestrian area characterized by concrete planters and a large building mural. The scene then expands into a bustling market plaza where the lighting shifts toward the vivid hues of red vertical banners and blue neon food stalls. Finally, the camera glides past outdoor seating and digital advertising screens as pedestrians move through the brightly illuminated square.
